title: Fix TUI adversarial review findings (C1, C2, H1-H4, M1-M7)

comments.author: maxine-at-forecast--noether--tui-dashboard
comments.content:
Adversarial review of TUI (all 5 phases). Consolidated findings:

CRITICAL (2):
- C1: Terminal not restored on error paths — if App::new(), terminal.draw(), or event::read() returns Err, cleanup is skipped. Terminal left in raw mode. Fix: RAII guard struct.
- C2: truncate_str/truncate panics on multi-byte UTF-8 — uses byte indexing `&s[..n]`. Any non-ASCII agent ID or branch name crashes TUI. Fix: use char_indices().

HIGH (4):
- H1: Blocking network I/O (sync.fetch()) freezes TUI on slow/offline networks (agents_tab, knowledge_tab).
- H2: IssuesTab opens a new DB connection on every keystroke, even arrow navigation.
- H3: event_scroll u16 truncation silently wraps for >65K events in config_tab.
- H4: Panic hook never restored after run() returns; calling run() twice chains hooks.

MEDIUM (7):
- M1: Unbounded scroll in all detail views — can scroll past content into blank space.
- M2: 'q' quits from issue detail view with no confirmation.
- M3: Clipboard copy (y key) gives no feedback — result silently ignored.
- M4: Detail Esc always returns to List, not Tree view.
- M5: Mouse tab-bar click uses byte len() not display width; border clicks trigger switch.
- M6: Flash message cleared on any mouse event including hover.
- M7: build_tree_recursive has no depth limit or cycle detection.

LOW (8):
- L1: Inconsistent on_enter refresh across tabs.
- L2: Status bar r:Refresh hint without global binding.
- L3: Unused content_area field.
- L4: Help overlay has no scroll support.
- L5: Tag filter cycles by index not name (loses position on refresh).
- L6: Negative time display for future timestamps.
- L7: Missing y:Copy hints in detail view footers.

NIT (5): Duplicate truncate/format_relative_time helpers, SyncManager created twice per config refresh, dead PlaceholderTab, hardcoded tab count range.

Recommended fix priority: C1 (terminal guard), C2 (UTF-8 safe truncation), H4 (panic hook restore), M3 (clipboard feedback).

comments.author: maxine-at-forecast--noether--tui-dashboard
comments.content:
Fixed ADR findings:

CRITICAL: C1 (RAII terminal guard), C2 (UTF-8 safe truncation)
HIGH: H2 (lazy DB open), H3 (event_scroll usize), H4 (panic hook restore)
MEDIUM: M3 (clipboard flash feedback), M4 (detail Esc to prev view), M5 (tab click char width), M6 (flash only on click/scroll), M7 (tree depth limit)
LOW: L4 (unused field), L7 (future timestamp), L8 (y:Copy hints)

Deferred: H1 (async I/O), M1 (scroll clamping), M2 (q from detail), L1-L3/L5-L6 (minor consistency)

123 tests pass, clippy clean, Cargo.lock regenerated.
